news.title: Why Is Cloudflare Stock Skyrocketing Wednesday?
news.summary: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) stock jumps in premarket on Q4 earnings beat driven by AI demand. Revenue up 34%, EPS beats estimates.

news.title: Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) Stock Surges on Strong Q4 Earnings and Upbeat 2026 Outlook
news.summary: Cloudflare stock surges after Q4 revenue beats estimates and strong 2026 outlook, driven by AI and security demand.

news.title: Cloudflare Stock Charges Higher On Q4 Earnings Beat Driven By AI Demand
news.summary: Cloudflare Inc (NYSE:NET) reports financial results for the fourth quarter after the market close on Tuesday.

news.title: Cloudflare Rallies On Q4 Beat As AI Adoption Drives Growth
news.summary: Cloudflare (NET) shares rose after beating Q4 expectations. Analysts maintain ratings, with price targets ranging from $225 to $250.

news.title: Piper Sandler Maintains Neutral on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $222
news.summary: Piper Sandler  analyst James Fish   maintains Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) with a Neutral and raises the price target from $220 to $222.

news.title: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $240
news.summary: RBC Capital  analyst Matthew Hedberg   maintains Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $230 to $240.

news.title: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $270
news.summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Ryan Macwilliams   maintains Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $265 to $270.

news.title: Guggenheim Maintains Sell on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $140
news.summary: Guggenheim  analyst John Difucci   maintains Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) with a Sell and raises the price target from $117 to $140.

news.title: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Cloudflare, Raises Price Target to $250
news.summary: Barclays  analyst Saket Kalia   maintains Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $235 to $250.

news.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Reiterates Neutral on Cloudflare, Maintains $224 Price Target
news.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Thomas Blakey   reiterates Cloudflare (NYSE:NET) with a Neutral and maintains $224 price target.
